intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把借钱方向、托尼的背景和最后的饭钱反转读顺。

sentences.text: I was having dinner at a restaurant when Tony Steele came in.
sentences.focus_zh: was having dinner 是背景动作，when Tony Steele came in 是托尼突然进入这个场景。

sentences.text: Tony worked in a lawyer's office years ago, but he is now working at a bank.
sentences.focus_zh: worked years ago 和 is now working 对比托尼以前和现在的工作。

sentences.text: He gets a good salary, but he always borrows money from his friends and never pays it back.
sentences.focus_zh: good salary 说明他有收入；borrows money from 和 never pays it back 是公平问题。

sentences.text: Tony saw me and came and sat at the same table.
sentences.focus_zh: saw, came, sat 是连续动作，读得干净一点，像讲故事推进。

sentences.text: He has never borrowed money from me.
sentences.focus_zh: has never borrowed 是到现在为止从来没有；from me 是结尾笑点的设置。

sentences.text: While he was eating, I asked him to lend me twenty pounds.
sentences.focus_zh: While he was eating 是同时发生；lend me twenty pounds 是让托尼把钱借给我。

sentences.text: To my surprise, he gave me the money immediately.
sentences.focus_zh: To my surprise 要读出意外；immediately 表示托尼立刻给钱，反而让结尾更讽刺。

sentences.text: 'I have never borrowed any money from you,' Tony said, 'so now you can pay for my dinner!'
sentences.focus_zh: 读清楚 quotation 的两段：从未向你借过钱，所以现在你可以替我付饭钱。
